summary: Frontend-only regression test after downgrading react-native-google-mobile-ads from 16.4.0 to 15.6.0 (to fix EAS Android Kotlin metadata mismatch). All preview flows work without any runtime errors: lock unlock, launcher, notification shade + fake sponsor card fallback, skins with simulated rewarded modal, settings, and back navigation. package.json confirmed at exactly '15.6.0'.
action_items: Non-blocking (pre-existing, also noted in iteration_3): RN Web deprecation warnings in console for 'textShadow*', 'shadow*', and 'props.pointerEvents'. Not caused by this downgrade.

Note (from iteration_3): Android APP ID placeholder 'ca-app-pub-5626622356708517~XXXXXXXXXX' in app.json plugins → react-native-google-mobile-ads → androidAppId still needs the real numeric ID before an actual Android production build, otherwise the native build will crash on startup. Unrelated to the downgrade itself, but a reminder for the main agent.
critical_code_review_comments: No source changes required — API surface identical between 15.6.0 and 16.4.0 for BannerAd, NativeAd, RewardedAd, TestIds. Ads service modules (src/services/ads/index.tsx and index.android.tsx) still import cleanly (shade renders, so module resolution succeeded).
context_for_next_testing_agent: react-native-google-mobile-ads is pinned at 15.6.0 to keep Kotlin 2.1.x compatible with the EAS builder (avoids play-services-ads:25.4.0 which is Kotlin 2.3). Preview always shows fake fallback UI for ads; real AdMob only fires in an Android native build.
rca_of_issue: N/A — regression check passed on all listed test cases.

detailed_results.lock_screen: PASS — lock-unlock-btn present; tapping navigates to /launcher.
detailed_results.launcher_boot: PASS — /launcher loads with no red screen; enter-immersive-btn visible with text 'IMMERSIVE'.
detailed_results.notification_shade_open_close: PASS — open-shade-btn opens shade; notif-close-btn closes it.
detailed_results.fake_sponsor_card_fallback: PASS — testID='fake-native-sponsor-card' visible inside open shade (proves src/services/ads/* module resolves after downgrade).
detailed_results.skins_screen: PASS — /skins renders 7 skin cards (6 unlock-* + 1 active-*). Tapping unlock-* opens the simulated rewarded-ad modal with 'REWARDED AD / Watch to unlock skin / AdMob rewarded video · sample / Reward in Ns' countdown visible (screenshot showed 'Reward in 4s'). Confirms useRewardedAd hook shape didn't break.
detailed_results.settings_screen: PASS — /settings shows seg-haptic, seg-particle, seg-anim segmented controls and toggle-vibration, toggle-sounds. Back navigation returns to launcher with enter-immersive-btn re-visible.
detailed_results.runtime_errors: None. Only pre-existing RN Web deprecation warnings appeared in console.
